rawPrompt: a black yellow sandbox ladning page like a showcase for those 2 components ,  i would like no scroll

selectedComponents.name: Iridescence

fullSource.name: Iridescence.tsx
IridescenceInstall.md
fullSource.content:
Install 
CLI
pnpm = pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Iridescence-JS-CSS
npm = npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Iridescence-JS-CSS
yarn = yarn shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Iridescence-JS-CSS
bun = bun x --bun shadcn@latest add @react-bits/Iridescence-JS-CSS

Install 
MANUAL
pnpm = pnpm add ogl
npm = npm install ogl
yarn = yarn add ogl
bun =  bun add ogl

fullSource.content:
Install 
CLI
pnpm = pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/FallingText-JS-CSS
npm = npx shadcn@latest add @react-bits/FallingText-JS-CSS
yarn = yarn shadcn@latest add @react-bits/FallingText-JS-CSS
bun = bun x --bun shadcn@latest add @react-bits/FallingText-JS-CSS

Install 
MANUAL
pnpm = pnpm add matter-js
npm = npm install matter-js
yarn = yarn add matter-js
bun =  bun add matter-js
